plugin.changelog: v0.5.2 — Fix 7 deployment-blocker issues from session aa4e7b2f: log-analytics subscription scope + RG, archetype-policies safe-access, placeholder-subscription detector with operator warning, per-bucket scaffold resilience, pre_tool_use transport-layer hardening (blocks Invoke-RestMethod/curl/az rest writes vs ARM/Graph), and how-to-deploy.md operator permissions + deploy-order sections.

_comment: Baseline source: Azure-Landing-Zones-Library contains both ALZ and SLZ platform trees. Pinned to the latest main commit at implementation start (2026-04-16) and refreshed on a quarterly cadence. Every file in data/baseline/ must match its upstream SHA — verified by scripts/slz_readiness/evaluate/baseline_integrity.py.

avm_modules._comment: Populated by the `avm-templates` milestone. Each entry: {module: 'avm/res/<svc>/<res>', version: 'x.y.z'}.
